priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: 100% reproducible crash on Proceed to Pay, all Android users affected (~60% of user base), revenue-blocking checkout outage, high-similarity P0 historical precedent (FLIPPI-1198, 0.82)
severity_justification: The bug causes a 100%-reproducible crash for all Android users on v2.4.2 at the 'Proceed to Pay' step, completely blocking checkout and making it revenue-blocking. With ~60% of the user base on Android, zero purchases can be completed, constituting a full checkout outage. A nearly identical historical bug (FLIPPI-1198: iOS crash on 'continue to payment', similarity 0.82) was also classified P0, confirming this severity tier.
owner_reason: Shailja Rani is the assignee on the three closest checkout-component bugs (FLIPPI-1663, FLIPPI-1654, FLIPPI-1665), establishing her as the primary owner of checkout page issues on the SLAP team.
